title: brassaia brassaiella
intro: Brassaia brassaiella, also known as the "Uva Ursi," is a type of flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its astringent and antiseptic effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including urinary tract infections, diarrhea, and sore throats, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and kill bacteria. Brassaia brassaiella can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat these conditions.
